en: She was more like a beauty queen from a movie scene
I said don't mind but what do you mean I am the one
ko: 나는 신경 쓰지 말라고 했지만, 내가 그 사람이라는 게 무슨 뜻이야?

en: Who will dance on the floor in the round
She said I am the one
Who will dance on the floor in the round
She told me her name was Billie Jean And she calls to sing
ko: 그녀는 자기 이름이 빌리 진이라고 말했어

en: Then her heavy hair turned into ice To dream of being the one
Who will dance on the floor in the round
People always told me Be careful what you do
ko: 사람들은 항상 나에게 조심하라고 했어, 네가 하는 일에

en: Don't go around breaking young girls' hearts
ko: 젊은 여자아이들의 마음을 다치게 하지 말라고

en: And mother always told me Be careful who you love Be careful what you do
ko: 그리고 엄마는 항상 나에게 사랑하는 사람을 조심하라고 했어

en: Cause the love it comes through the pain
Billie Jean is not my lover
